title: Autoscaling Workloads — Autoscaling based on schedules
text:
Another strategy for scaling your workloads is to
schedule
the scaling operations, for example in order to
reduce resource consumption during off-peak hours.
Similar to event driven autoscaling, such behavior can be achieved using KEDA in conjunction with
its
Cron
scaler
.
The
Cron
scaler allows you to define schedules (and time zones) for scaling your workloads in or out.
